popup_enabled_tooltip.message: If checked, the extension will filter out brands you don't want to see

popup_filter_color_tooltip.message: Highlight items in color rather than hiding items not on the list

popup_filter_sidebar.description: Also hide brands in the sidebar

popup_filter_sidebar_tooltip.message: If checked this will hide (or grey out) brands in the sidebar that are not on the list

popup_sidebar_hide.description: Hide filtered items in the sidebar

popup_sidebar_hide_tooltip.message: If selected this will hide brands in the sidebar that are not on the list

popup_sidebar_grey.description: Grey out filtered items in the sidebar

popup_sidebar_grey_tooltip.message: If selected this will set the text of unknown brands in the sidebar to grey

popup_allow_refine_bypass.description: Disable filtering when you select a brand in the sidebar

popup_allow_refine_bypass_tooltip.message: If checked then selecting a brand in the sidebar will bypass the filter and show results regardless of if the brand is on the list

popup_debug_tooltip.message: Will highlight search results in red/green to show what would be filtered without hiding them.  Also logs much more to the console.

popup_personal_blocklist_tooltip.message: Brands added to this list will be blocked regardless of if they are on the known list or not.

department_header.description: Current Departments, uncheck to disable filtering for a department

department_header_tooltip.message: All departments ever seen.  Unchecking a department will disable filtering any time that department is seen.
department_header_tooltip.description: Current Departments, uncheck to disable filtering for a department

brand_list_version.description: Show what version of the list we have

brand_list_count.description: How many brands we know about

brand.description: For use when you just want to use the word 'brand'

popup_feedback_link.description: Link to github to report issues or request features

popup_missing_brand.description: Link to AmazonBrandFilter to request a brand be added

popup_last_run.description: How long the last run took

popup_help_translate.description: Link to help translate the extension

clear_seen_brands.description: For clearing the seen brand list

clear_seen_brands_tooltip.message: Will seen brands list to allow it to rebuild.  Mostly used to clear out faulty data from Amazon.

show_all.description: For show/hide button for known departments on the dashboard

hide_all.description: For show/hide button for known departments on the dashboard

dept_count.description: How many departments we know about

current_departments_tooltip.message: Departments found on page.  Unchecking a department will disable filtering any time that department is seen.

use_filter_with_refiner.description: label for Filter with Refiner checkbox

use_filter_with_refiner_tooltip.message: Base brand filter on the brands showing in the refiner on the left side of the page.  This will reduce false positives but might also increase false negatives if Amazon doesn't show all the brands on the page.

experimental_features_tooltip.message: These features are experimental and may not work as expected.  Please report any issues you encounter.

search_depth_tooltip.message: Controls how many words in the product title are searched, a higher number will catch more brands but may also increase false positives while a low number may miss some brands.

seen_brands_list_text_tooltip.message: Every brand ever seen. While searching.
